# festybam Motors - MERN Stack Car Dealership Platform

## Project Overview
Production-ready car dealership and marketplace website built with MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js).

**Tech Stack:**
- Frontend: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Mongoose
- Payments: Paystack
- Cloud Storage: Cloudinary
- Deployment: Vercel (frontend), Render (backend), MongoDB Atlas

## Key Features to Implement
- Car listings with advanced filters
- Test drive booking system
- Car comparison tool
- Financing calculator
- Admin/Dealer/Customer dashboards
- Payment processing
- Review and rating system
- Blog system
- Dark/Light mode

## Important Notes
- All environment variables must be added to .env file (use .env.example as template)
- Cloudinary and Paystack credentials required for full functionality
- Seed data included for initial setup
- All API routes are secured with JWT
- Role-based access control (Admin, Dealer, Customer)
